titlestmt.titleproper: Cornell University Library Acquisitions Department records13-3-1086
titlestmt.author: Compiled by G. Stamp

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-05-01 18:01:32 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Cornell University Library Acquisitions Department records
did.physdesc: Correspondence, bulletins, memos, meeting minutes, reports, budget books.
did.abstract: Correspondence files dealing with requests for books as well as cancellations of request, and letters denoting request or shipment errors. Also included are information bulletins, technical memos, minutes of library department meetings, the 1964-65 Book Budget, a Catalogue Procedures Manual, and payroll carbons from the Industrial and Labor Relations library. 1963-1964 monthly reports, sample acquisition forms, and special non-heading orders are also included.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Correspondence files dealing with requests for books as well as cancellations of request, and letters denoting request or shipment errors. Also included are information bulletins, technical memos, minutes of library department meetings, the 1964-65 Book Budget, a Catalogue Procedures Manual, and payroll carbons from the Industrial and Labor Relations library. 1963-64 monthly reports, sample acquisition forms, and special non-heading orders are also included.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cornell University Libraries Acquisitions Department correspondence, #13-3-1086. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Acquisitions Department - What It Is and What It Does
